name: COPART INC
summary: Copart, Inc. is a leading global provider of online auctions and vehicle remarketing services, operating in the U.S., U.K., Germany, Brazil, Canada, U.A.E., Spain, Finland, Oman, Republic of Ireland, and Bahrain. The company processes and sells vehicles—primarily damaged or total-loss vehicles from insurance companies—through its VB3 internet auction platform to dismantlers, rebuilders, dealers, exporters, and the general public. For fiscal 2025, revenues were $4.6 billion and operating income was $1.7 billion.
